title: Logging and Diagnostics

classes.name: AbstractLogger
methods: __construct(string $level): void  // iterates LogLevel::all() to set enabledLevels map

classes.name: LoggingTrait
methods: protected static logDebug(string $message, array $context = []): void  // calls Logger::get()->debug()
protected static logWarning(string $message, array $context = []): void  // calls Logger::get()->warning()
protected static logError(string $message, array $context = []): void  // calls Logger::get()->error()

classes.name: InterpolateTrait
methods: public static interpolate(string $message, array $context = []): string  // PSR-3 {placeholder} substitution

classes.name: Logger
methods: public static get(): LoggerInterface  // lazy-init: ErrorLogLogger(DEBUG) if DD_TRACE_DEBUG, else NullLogger(EMERGENCY)
classes.notes: Singleton/registry pattern. Auto-creates ErrorLogLogger when DD_TRACE_DEBUG env is true.

classes.name: LogLevel
methods: public static all(): string[]  // returns ordered array highest→lowest

classes.name: ErrorLogLogger
methods: private emit(string $level, string $message, array $context): void  // checks isLevelActive, interpolates, writes to error_log('[date] [ddtrace] [level] - msg')

classes.name: DatadogLogger
methods: __construct($stream = null, string $mode = 'a')  // reads DD_TRACE_LOG_FILE env, defaults to error_log or php://stderr
emergency/alert/critical/error/warning/notice/info/debug($message, array $context): void  // all delegate to log()
log(string $level, $message, array $context): void  // validates level, calls emit(format(...))
private static format(string $level, $message, array $context): string  // JSON: {message, status, timestamp} + log injection fields
private static handleLogInjection(): array  // appends dd.trace_id, dd.span_id if DD_LOGS_INJECTION enabled
private emit(string $message): void  // fwrite to stream
classes.notes: Internal JSON stream logger. NOT extending AbstractLogger. Supports log correlation (trace_id/span_id injection). Inspired by Monolog StreamHandler.

classes.name: DebugLogger
methods: debug(string $message, array $context = []): void  // appends to records
hasOnly(string $level, string $message): bool  // exactly one matching record
classes.notes: Test-only in-memory logger for asserting log output in unit tests.

relationships: Logger creates ErrorLogLogger or NullLogger on demand
key_patterns: Registry/Singleton: Logger::get()/set()/reset() manages global LoggerInterface instance
Level gating: AbstractLogger::__construct() builds enabledLevels map from LogLevel::all() ordered list
PSR-3 interpolation: InterpolateTrait::interpolate() replaces {key} placeholders in messages
Log injection: DatadogLogger injects dd.trace_id + dd.span_id into JSON when DD_LOGS_INJECTION=true
Auto-config: Logger::get() checks DD_TRACE_DEBUG env to auto-select ErrorLogLogger vs NullLogger
important_notes: DiagnosticsLogger does not exist as a standalone class; DatadogLogger fills the diagnostic/structured logging role (JSON to stream + correlation IDs). LoggingTrait is used by core tracing classes (Tracer, Span, TextMap) to emit log messages via the global Logger registry. LogLevel follows PSR-3 standard (8 levels). DatadogLogger is @internal and can be removed without notice.
